message:
feat(transport): add rollback_record, dedup drain, and expiry-driven eviction to symbol aggregator

src/transport/aggregator.rs — Added rollback_record() to allow previously
recorded symbols to be retransmitted after rollback, returning whether a
recorded symbol was actually removed. Added deduplication drain that
processes accumulated duplicate symbols in batch. Added expiry-driven
eviction for stale object state entries based on configurable TTL, with
metrics tracking for eviction counts and reclaimed capacity. Added tests
covering rollback semantics, drain ordering, and expiry edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
